name: Emerald Resources Nl
analysis: It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.9100, stop A$4.6926, target A$6.6100 (0.57:1) — then trail it.
